New Document

Fields marked * are required

Entity Name *
Entity name is required.
Contact Person *
Contact person is required.
Email Address *
A valid email address is required.
Remarks
Date & Time Created
— set automatically —
Timestamp set automatically on save.

Record Stage

Confirm timestamp

Passed By *
Required.
Sent By (CDO II) *
Required.
Date & Time *
Required.
Cannot be a future time.

Pre-Assessment Result

Record timestamp and outcome

Date & Time *
Required.
Cannot be a future time.
Result *
Complete
Proceed to Phase 1A
Incomplete
Records assessment timestamp only
Please select a result.

Certificate Decision

Record receipt and outcome (CDO II)

Date & Time Received *
Required.
Cannot be a future time.
Outcome *
Approved
Proceed to Phase 5A → 6A
Disapproved
Proceed to Phase 5B → 6B
Please select an outcome.

⚠ Redact Stage

This will remove the timestamp and reset the stage to unstamped

Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. The timestamp will be permanently removed.
This action is irreversible.

⚠ Delete Document

Enter PIN to confirm deletion

This document and all its recorded stages will be permanently deleted.
Enter PIN to confirm
This action is irreversible.
